thesis.statement: The look borrows the intensity of body-horror color logic but redirects it toward care, repair, and fear of intimacy.
principles: Use one symbolic color as both attraction and alarm.

palette.description: A single acid color becomes the emotional switch inside otherwise restrained rooms.

observations.text: The symbolic color should contaminate neutrals rather than sit beside them.

toneMood.description: The image should seduce first, then reveal the cost of that seduction.

composition.description: Symmetry creates promise; interruptions create doubt.

patterns.name: Perfect surface, broken edge
patterns.description: Keep frames controlled but let one edge betray instability.

lighting.description: Soft beauty light becomes suspect when colored sources enter.

patterns.name: Soft corruption
patterns.description: Let gentle light be invaded by the symbolic color.

texture.description: Gloss, skin, fabric, and condensation carry emotional and bodily stakes.

observations.text: Texture should make beauty feel vulnerable.

camera.description: The camera treats intimacy as evidence.

movement.name: Curious push
movement.description: Push in when beauty becomes suspicious.

motion.name: Contained rupture
motion.description: Hold still until the body or room breaks the pattern.

framing.name: Intimate specimen
framing.description: Frame close details with care, not detachment.
